name: agent-tools
description: Public agent tooling workspace for skills, commands, plugins, and future MCP servers.

scripts.syntax: python3 -m py_compile packages/watch-video/scripts/*.py && python3 -m py_compile codex/watch-video/scripts/*.py && python3 -m py_compile plugins/watch-video/skills/watch-video/scripts/*.py && python3 -m py_compile scripts/*.py && bash -n scripts/*.sh
